description: Project conventions, architecture overview, code style rules, and debugging guidelines
Core data model: Layout, Bin, Layer, Category, Drawer. Branded ID types (BinId, LayerId, etc.). Interaction types.
All constraints (grid, layers, categories, undo limits), half-bin helpers, default values, ID generators, breakpoints
Result<T, E> type system — ok/err constructors, type guards, error types, utility functions
Public storage facade — atomic operations, layout CRUD, library management, import/export
API error codes, token hashing, ID validation, constant-time comparison utilities
Layout share validation — size limits, bin constraints, custom property validation, prototype pollution prevention
Rate limiting implementation — Redis sliding window, action tiers, fail-closed production behavior
Content moderation — blocklist, XSS detection, URL filtering, spam detection
